location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

download_url.description: The URL to download the file.

expires_at.description: The time the download URL expires in Unix timestamp.

size_bytes.description: The size of the file in bytes.

$schema.description: A URL to the JSON Schema for this object.

product_ids.description: The product IDs to get prices for. At least one of skus or product_ids is required.

skus.description: The SKUs to get prices for. At least one of skus or product_ids is required.

asks.description: The number of asks for the variant

beat_us_price.description: The price needed to beat the lowest ask in the US market

earn_more.description: The price needed to be the lowest ask in your local market

price.description: The lowest ask price of the variant

sell_faster.description: The price needed to be the lowest ask to more buyers

size_type.description: The variant size type, often US

type.description: The delivery type for this price

id.description: Unique identifier for the product release

release_price_converted.description: Retail price converted to target currency

total_sales.description: Total historical sales volume on Kream

converted_sizes.description: Estimated regional size conversions (subject to manufacturer variance)

highest_bid_converted.description: Maximum purchase offer in target currency

id.description: Unique identifier for the specific variant

lowest_ask_converted.description: Minimum listing price in target currency

available.description: Whether the product is available for purchase

cursor.description: Cursor used to paginate through the product

id.description: A hash of the product, used for internal tracking

images.description: The image URLs of the product

metadata.description: Might contain additional information about the product

price_display.description: The default price displayed on Shopify

available.description: Whether the variant is available for purchase

id.description: A hash of the variant, used for internal tracking

examples: MENS / Men's US 4 / Women's US 5.5 / UK 3.5 / EU 36 / JP 23

created_at.description: Product created at, internally used to track creation

description.description: Product description, may contain HTML tags

id.description: Product ID, identical to StockX's product ID

rank.description: Popularity of the product, computed from weekly orders

short_description.description: A LLM-generated short description of the product

slug.description: Product slug, identical to StockX's product URL

traits.description: List of traits of the product, enabled via display[traits]

updated_at.description: Product updated at, internally used to track changes

variants.description: List of variants of the product, enabled via display[variants]

id.description: Variant ID, identical to StockX's variant ID

identifiers.description: List of identifiers of the variant, enabled via display[identifiers]

lowest_ask.description: Lowest ask price of the variant

position.description: Position of the variant in the product

prices.description: List of prices of the variant, enabled via display[prices]

sales_count_15_days.description: Sales count of the variant in the last 15 days

sales_count_30_days.description: Sales count of the variant in the last 30 days

sales_count_60_days.description: Sales count of the variant in the last 60 days

sizes.description: Converted sizes from StockX's size chart

updated_at.description: Variant updated at, internally used to track changes

asks.description: Number of asks for the variant

beat_us_price.description: Price needed to beat the lowset ask in the US market

earn_more.description: Price needed to be the lowest ask in your local market

sell_faster.description: Price needed to be the lowest ask to more buyers

type.description: The delivery type for this price

apiKey.description: API Key, required for all requests. Get yours at https://kicks.dev/register
apiKey.name: Authorization

info.description:
KicksDB is a platform that allow getting data from multiple e-commerce platform linked
to sneakers, apparel and collectibles. Data is collected daily from StockX, GOAT, Flight Club, Kickscrew, Stadium Goods and multiple Shopify stores.

See the [documentation with examples](https://docs.kicks.dev/) for more information.
info.title: KicksDB API

get.description: Get products from StockX. Use `display[*]` to enable/disable specific relations in the response. **Important: `filters` is not supported with other pre-defined filters.**
